prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document outlines the charging proposals and regulatory costs specific to the Environment Agency, which operates in England and is governed by the Environment Act 1995. As the context and requirements are focused on the operations and regulatory framework applicable to England, this document specifically applies to England.
